data.title: Strategy breaks billion-dollar streak with 2,932 BTC acquisition for $264M
data.description:
Strategy acquired 2,932 BTC, mostly financed through more MSTR common shares, in addition to $7M from STRC preferred shares.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/strategy-breaks-billion-dollar-streak-with-2932-btc-acquisition-for-264m/

data.title: Tezos Completes 20th Protocol Upgrade, Cuts Block Time to 6 Seconds
data.description:
Tezos activated its Tallinn protocol upgrade on January 24, 2026, reducing block time from 8 seconds to 6 seconds. The upgrade marks the blockchain's 20th forkless evolution through on-chain governance.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/tezos-tallinn-upgrade-slashes-block-time-6-seconds

data.title: The "1011 Insider Whale" reduced its Ethereum long positions by 12,588 ETH in the past half hour, resulting in a total unrealized loss of over $58 million.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that "1011 Insider Whale" reduced its 5x leveraged Ethereum long position by 12,588 ETH in the past half hour, currently holding 210,752.6582 ETH at a liquidation price of $2,135. It also holds a 5x leveraged long position of 1,000 BTC and a 10x leveraged long position of 511,612.85 SOL, with a current total unrealized loss exceeding $58 million.

data.title: BNB Chain's prediction market has surpassed $20 billion in cumulative transaction volume.
data.description: According to data from Dune cited in an article published on the BNB Chain X platform, the cumulative transaction volume of the BNB Chain on-chain prediction market has exceeded $20 billion.

data.title: US Bitcoin Miners Slow as Winter Storm Hits Power Grids
data.description:
Extreme cold led miners to curb their electricity use, briefly cutting hashrate as grid stress spread across several regions.
source: https://decrypt.co/355836/us-bitcoin-miners-slow-as-winter-storm-hits-power-grids

data.title: Blockchain's Viability Beyond Finance Questioned After Farcaster's Collapse
data.description: The collapse of the crypto social media platform Farcaster has sparked renewed skepticism regarding blockchain applications outside the financial sector. According to NS3.AI, while some critics point to inadequate leadership as a contributing factor, more profound intrinsic challenges have impeded wider adoption. This incident has reignited debates on the practical use cases of blockchain technology beyond cryptocurrencies and finance.

data.title: 149 million Infostealer data entries exposed, involving some Binance user accounts.
data.description: Security researcher Jeremiah Fowler disclosed a leaked dataset of approximately 149 million records from Infostealer (information-stealing malware), including about 420,000 login credentials related to Binance. This data originated from infected personal devices, affecting multiple platforms including Gmail, Facebook, Instagram, and Netflix. Security experts emphasized that this was not a system breach at Binance, but rather an infection of user devices. Binance stated it will monitor the dark web, alert affected users, and reset their passwords, while also recommending users enable hardware-level multi-factor authentication (MFA), use antivirus software, and strengthen account security. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Crypto stocks opened lower across the board in the US, with ETHZilla down 2.29%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.19%, the S&P 500 rose 0.22%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.1%. Cryptocurrency stocks generally fell, with ETHZilla down 2.29%, Circle down 1.59%, Bit Digital down 3.32%, Robinhood down 1.57%, Hut 8 down 0.77%, and Coinbase down 2.36%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Crypto KOL Discusses Conflict Resolution in Online Post
data.description: Crypto KOL @roger73005305 posted on X. In a recent online discussion, the topic of conflict resolution was addressed. The post suggested that if a resolution cannot be reached, it may indicate a lack of personal development, though exceptions exist in extreme situations.

data.title: Japan To Allow The Trading Of Its First Crypto ETFs By 2028: Report
data.description:
Japan’s financial watchdog is considering potential rule changes that could pave the way for the listing of the country’s first set of crypto ETFs as early as 2028.
source: https://zycrypto.com/japan-to-allow-the-trading-of-its-first-crypto-etfs-by-2028-report/

data.title: Binance launches Tesla futures and expands TradFi offering
data.description:
Binance launches Tesla Futures as part of its TradFi expansion. The crypto exchange enables 24/7 trading with stock derivatives for the first time. The article Binance launches Tesla futures and expands TradFi offering was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
source: https://cryptovalleyjournal.com/hot-topics/news/binance-launches-tesla-futures-tradfi-expansion/?utm_campaign=rss_reader&utm_medium=rss&utm_source=feed_source&utm_content=Binance+launches+Tesla+futures+and+expands+TradFi+offering

data.title: Last week, global listed companies were net buyers of BTC, totaling $290 million. Strategy invested $264 million to purchase 2,932 Bitcoins.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, as of 8:30 AM ET on January 26, 2025, the total net purchase of Bitcoin by global listed companies (excluding mining companies) last week was $290 million, a decrease of 86.5% compared to the previous week. Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) announced on January 26 that it invested $264 million (an 87.7% decrease compared to the previous week) to acquire 2,932 Bitcoins at a price of $90,061, bringing its total holdings to 712,647 Bitcoins. Japanese listed company Metaplanet did not purchase any Bitcoin last week, marking its second consecutive week without purchases. In addition, three other companies purchased Bitcoin last week. On January 21, Japanese fashion brand ANAP announced an investment of $6.94 million to acquire 70.4485 bitcoins at a price of $98,574.8, bringing its total holdings to 1,417.0341 bitcoins. On January 22, Japanese food brand DayDayCook announced an investment of $17.62 million to purchase 200 bitcoins at a price of $88,085, bringing its total holdings to 1,583 bitcoins. On January 22, UK-based website and digital marketing services company The Smarter Web Company announced an investment of $900,000 to acquire 10 bitcoins at a price of $90,289, bringing its total holdings to 2,674 bitcoins. Asset management and bitcoin reserve company Strive announced a follow-on offering of Variable Rate Series A Perpetual Preferred Stock (SATA Stock), raising $150 million, with the funds intended for acquiring over 5,000 bitcoins. As of press time, the total number of Bitcoins held by listed companies worldwide (excluding mining companies) is 963,020, an increase of 0.3% compared to last week, with a current market value of approximately US$84.66 billion, accounting for 4.8% of Bitcoin's circulating market capitalization.

data.title: Blockchain infrastructure company Zerohash is in talks to raise $250 million at a valuation of $1.5 billion.
data.description: Blockchain infrastructure company Zerohash is in talks to raise $250 million at a $1.5 billion valuation, though it has not yet responded to requests for comment. The amount is subject to change as discussions are ongoing. Zerohash raised $104 million in a D-2 funding round led by Interactive Brokers last October, valuing the company at $1 billion. Founded in 2017, the company provides APIs and embeddable developer tools that enable financial institutions and fintech companies to deliver cryptocurrencies, stablecoins, and tokenized products. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Zerohash Seeks $250 Million Funding at $1.5 Billion Valuation
data.description: Blockchain infrastructure firm Zerohash is in discussions to raise $250 million at a valuation of $1.5 billion. According to Odaily, Zerohash has not yet responded to requests for comment, and the transaction details may change as discussions are ongoing. Last October, Zerohash raised $104 million in a Series D-2 funding round led by Interactive Brokers, which valued the company at $1 billion. Founded in 2017, Zerohash provides APIs and developer tools that enable financial institutions and fintech companies to offer cryptocurrency, stablecoin, and tokenized products.

data.title: OpenAI Pursues Premium Pricing in Early Advertising Campaigns
data.description: OpenAI is reportedly seeking premium pricing in its initial advertising efforts. According to PANews, the company aims to establish a higher price point as it introduces its services to the market. This strategy reflects OpenAI's approach to positioning itself as a leader in the industry, leveraging its advanced technology and innovative solutions. The move is part of a broader plan to capture a significant share of the market by emphasizing the value and uniqueness of its offerings.

data.title: The "1011 Insider Whale" bought another 23,000 ETH, bringing its total purchases today to 106,000 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the "1011 Insider Whale" is actively accumulating ETH. He has bought another 23,000 ETH, worth $66.7 million, bringing his total purchases today to 106,000 ETH, worth $304 million.

data.title: Goldman Sachs: Expects the Federal Reserve to keep interest rates stable, with the first rate cut likely in June.
data.description: Goldman Sachs expects a uneventful January Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting, with most parties likely agreeing to keep interest rates unchanged. The bank notes that Governors Waller and Bowman are likely to support this decision, while Stephen Milan will be the only dissenting voice. Goldman Sachs predicts the Fed will cut rates twice in 2026, with the first cut possibly in June. (Jinshi)

data.title: Gate will list BitGo Holdings Ondo Tokenized (BTGOON) spot and instant trading.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate will launch spot trading of BitGo Holdings Ondo Tokenized (BTGOON) at 22:00 (UTC+8) on January 26, and will list BitGo Holdings Ondo Tokenized (BTGOON) on the Flash Exchange platform at 23:00 (UTC+8).

data.title: Analysis: Rising gold prices and overvalued stocks may prompt investors to rebalance their funds towards cryptocurrencies.
data.description: According to IG analysis, rising gold prices and overvalued stocks may prompt investors to rebalance their portfolios towards cryptocurrencies, potentially triggering a new surge. Developments in UK regulation also provided support for cryptocurrencies. Bitcoin rose 1.4% to $87,680, and Ethereum rose 2.9% to $2,901.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Predicts Uneventful FOMC Meeting in January
data.description: Goldman Sachs anticipates that the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting in January will proceed without significant developments. According to PANews, the consensus among participants is expected to be in favor of maintaining the current interest rates. The bank highlighted that board members Waller and Bowman are likely to support this decision, while Stephen Milan is expected to be the sole dissenting voice. Goldman Sachs forecasts that the Federal Reserve will implement two interest rate cuts in 2026, with the first reduction potentially occurring in June.
